untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'voice intensity/volatility proxy' and activity baseline comparison (5-bar average activity drop/spike detection). Standard OHLCV indicators cannot directly measure acoustic intensity or custom activity metrics. Volume proxy is imperfect substitute. Signal also requires multi-bar sustained movement detection and percentage-change comparisons from rolling averages that exceed standard indicator capabilities.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Used volume as proxy for activity intensity (volume < 65% of baseline suggests activity drop; body_pct < 0.3 indicates directional weakness). However, this signal fundamentally requires custom acoustic/intensity data and rolling baseline comparisons not available in standard technical indicators. Recommendation: Implement custom activity_index indicator combining volume, range, and volatility metrics before backtesting this rule.
